description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story auto repair shop with a bright yellow exterior and a flat, weathered gray roof. The front facade features two large garage doors, one of which is open to reveal a white van inside, and a smaller pedestrian door. Above the garage doors is a prominent sign with Cyrillic text and an orange fruit logo, indicating the business name. To the right of the entrance, there is a small fenced area with what appears to be a bench and some miscellaneous items. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with a few utility boxes, a back door, and air conditioning units mounted on the wall. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A bright yellow, rectangular auto repair shop with a flat gray roof, large garage doors, and prominent signage in Cyrillic. The building features utility boxes, a fenced area, and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The view shows the flat, gray roof and the plain yellow side of the building, with minimal visible features except a small cylindrical object near the corner.
description_view_1: This is the front view, displaying two garage doors (one open with a van inside), a pedestrian door, a large sign with Cyrillic text and an orange logo, and a fenced area with a bench and items.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the yellow wall, the edge of the fenced area, and the flat roof, with no doors or windows visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a plain yellow wall with a single door and two white air conditioning units mounted on the exterior.
attribute_signage: Large sign with Cyrillic text 'АПЕЛЬСИН АВТО МОЙКА' and an orange fruit logo above the garage doors on the front facade.
attribute_garage_doors: 2 visible garage doors on the front, likely roll-up type, made of metal, each approximately 2.5 meters wide and 3 meters tall.
attribute_parked_cars_awaiting_service: 1 white van visible inside the open garage door at the front of the building.
